Control.Title: Spark Charts
Control.Description: Visualize data in a lightweight view.

Sample.Title: Getting started
Sample.SearchTags: spark, sparkline ,sparkline chart, charts, sparkarea, sparkcolumn, sparkwinloss

Sample.Title: Sales Report
Sample.SearchTags: spark, sparkline ,sparkline chart, charts, sparkarea, sparkcolumn, sales report, sparkwinloss

Sample.Title: Trackball
Sample.Description: This sample showcases the trackball feature. On mobile phones, long press on the chart to show the trackball, and drag the chart to change the position of the trackball. You can move the cursor over the chart area to display the trackball on the desktop.
